indexes.expression: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "Application_providerOrganization_code_unique" ON application."Application" USING btree ("providerOrganization", code)
CREATE INDEX "Application_providerOrganization_index" ON application."Application" USING btree ("providerOrganization")
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "ApplicationMembership_subscription_user_unique" ON application."ApplicationMembership" USING btree (subscription, "user")
CREATE INDEX "ApplicationMembership_user_index" ON application."ApplicationMembership" USING btree ("user")
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "ApplicationSubscription_customerOrganization_application_unique" ON application."ApplicationSubscription" USING btree ("customerOrganization", application)
CREATE INDEX "ApplicationSubscription_customerOrganization_index" ON application."ApplicationSubscription" USING btree ("customerOrganization")
CREATE INDEX "Audit_aggregateId_index" ON audit."Audit" USING btree ("aggregateId")
CREATE INDEX "Audit_eventType_index" ON audit."Audit" USING btree ("eventType")
CREATE INDEX "BillingOrder_billingProfile_index" ON billing."BillingOrder" USING btree ("billingProfile")
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "BillingOrder_idempotencyKey_unique" ON billing."BillingOrder" USING btree ("idempotencyKey")
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "BillingPayment_idempotencyKey_unique" ON billing."BillingPayment" USING btree ("idempotencyKey")
CREATE INDEX "BillingPayment_order_index" ON billing."BillingPayment" USING btree ("order")
CREATE INDEX "ManagerInvite_invitedBy_index" ON platform."ManagerInvite" USING btree ("invitedBy")
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "User_site_userAccount_unique" ON site."User" USING btree (site, "userAccount")
CREATE INDEX "User_userAccount_index" ON site."User" USING btree ("userAccount")
